title: LLMStreamRequest
description: Typed broker-local model stream request carrying canonical LLMRequest payload and stream controls.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for broker-local LLM stream request wrappers.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this broker-local LLM stream request wrapper.

run_id.description: Run identifier whose trusted policy context governs this model stream.

stream_id.description: Stable stream identity for the returned ordered LLMStreamEvent sequence.

llm_request.description: Canonical model request object carried through the broker-local stream API.

request_digest.description: Optional canonical digest for llm_request. When supplied, it must match the RFC8785-JCS sha256 of llm_request bytes.

follow.description: Whether the broker should keep stream transport open for future server-initiated additions.
